description_long: This is a modern military-style fighter jet with a sleek, angular fuselage and a digital camouflage paint scheme in shades of blue, gray, black, and white. The aircraft features sharply swept-back wings with pronounced leading edges and twin vertical stabilizers at the rear, giving it a stealthy, aggressive appearance. The cockpit is positioned near the front of the fuselage and is enclosed with a dark, streamlined canopy. The jet has two large engine exhausts at the rear, indicating a twin-engine configuration, and the undercarriage is not visible, suggesting retractable landing gear. The surface is smooth and hard, with a matte to semi-gloss finish that reduces glare. The overall design is optimized for speed, maneuverability, and low radar visibility, typical of fifth-generation fighter aircraft.
description: A modern, angular fighter jet with digital camouflage, twin vertical stabilizers, and a sleek, enclosed cockpit. Its swept-back wings and twin engines give it a stealthy, high-performance look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, angular cockpit canopy, and wide, swept-back wings with twin vertical stabilizers.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, sloped canopy, and the upward angle of the twin tail fins.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin engine exhausts, the symmetry of the tail fins, and the broad wingspan.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the camouflaged surface, wing sweep, and the profile of the vertical stabilizers.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with sharply swept-back wings and no visible winglets; wings have a moderate anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines with rear-mounted exhausts.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers in a canted arrangement with a conventional horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear (not visible in images).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a streamlined canopy.
